candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets; directly matches ACT definition.
Non-current, so not ACT.
Non-current total, so not ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets line from the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; best match for CHE.
Non-cash adjustment, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Cash flow roll-forward item, not balance-sheet CHE target.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of the period
candidates.why: Could reconcile to balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet line is preferred.
Not a cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash balance rather than cash-flow roll-forward rows.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line; directly matches LCT.
Non-current liabilities, not LCT.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Lease-related and should be excluded from STD baseline; also blank in preview.
Current portion of long-term debt; fits STD and excludes leases.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose current portion of long-term debt. Excluded lease-related rows per instruction. Did not add 'Bank loans and mortgage debt' current line because it likely overlaps with the supplemental debt maturity disclosure and could double count.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable line; best match for TXP.

variables.notes: Preferred current tax payable line over non-current 'Income tax liabilities'.

candidates.why: Would be ideal gross PPE, but appears blank/non-populated in preview.
Reported total tangible assets / net PPE; best available balance-sheet match.

candidates.row_label: Tangible assets in course of construction
candidates.why: Component of PPE, not total.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated depreciation of Tangible assets in course of construction
candidates.why: Contra/component line, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of property, plant and equipmen
candidates.why: Cash flow capex line, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Disposal of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow disposal line, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used net PPE total because the gross total line is not populated in the preview. This is acceptable under the preference for total/net PPE.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line; directly matches AT.
Exact operating cash flow total; directly matches OANCF.

variables.notes: Selected exact net cash flow from operating activities line.
